summary: DRHP Import SEBI-specific formatting - All 20 tests passed. Fixed 2 bugs in server.py (fs -> fs_bucket variable references). New python-docx parser working correctly with SEBI formatting preservation.

bugs_fixed.issue: Used undefined variable 'fs' instead of 'fs_bucket' in DRHPImageExtractor initialization
Used undefined variable 'fs' instead of 'fs_bucket' in get_drhp_image endpoint

passed_tests: 7. test_tables_preserved - Tables with drhp-table class preserved
10. test_sebi_css_styles_included - SEBI CSS classes in output

drhp_import_uses_python_docx.description: DRHP import endpoint uses new DRHPDocumentParser class based on python-docx

paragraph_alignment.description: Paragraph alignment (left, center, right, justify) preserved as inline styles

indentation.description: Indentation (left, right, first-line) preserved as inline styles

images_gridfs.description: Images stored in GridFS as separate files (DRHPImageExtractor)

images_array_response.description: Import response includes images array with file_id, url, content_type

critical_code_review_comments: DRHPDocumentParser class is well-structured with comprehensive SEBI style mappings
DRHPImageExtractor properly stores images in GridFS with project metadata
CSS styles cover all SEBI-specific formatting requirements
Hyperlink extraction handles both external links and internal bookmarks
test_credentials: Test users created via mongosh and cleaned up after tests
seed_data_creation: Test projects created dynamically for each test module
context_for_next_testing_agent: DRHP import refactoring complete. New python-docx based parser (DRHPDocumentParser) replaces mammoth. Images stored in GridFS via DRHPImageExtractor. Two bugs fixed in server.py (fs -> fs_bucket). All 20 tests passing. New test file test_drhp_sebi_formatting.py covers SEBI-specific features.
